prompt: Add textured paper background and vintage font, creating an old manuscript feel for the narrative graph sections.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Replace the solid blue background with a textured paper background. Change the font of all text elements on the graph, specifically 'Exposition', 'Inciting Incident', 'Rising Action', 'Midpoint', 'Climax', 'Denouement', 'ACT 1', 'ACT 2', and 'ACT 3', to a vintage font style. The overall aesthetic should convey the look and feel of an old manuscript.
objects: solid blue background (should not be present)
white circular markers on the graph
text labels 'Exposition', 'Inciting Incident', 'Rising Action', 'Midpoint', 'Climax', 'Denouement' (in vintage font style)
